payload.claim_text: The 2023 Adopted Budget is based on the midpoint between the 'high case' and 'low case' scenarios prepared by McKinsey & Co. last spring.
payload.subject: 2023 Adopted Budget

payload.claim_text: March 2023 is the first month since the pandemic began with employment higher than pre-pandemic employment, up 31,900 jobs (0.7%) when compared with March 2019.
payload.subject: NYC employment

tool_args.label: Capital Lockbox funds only for capital purposes

payload.claim_text: Funds received from the Mansion Tax and the Internet Sales Tax are deposited into the Capital Lockbox and are only available for capital purposes.
payload.subject: Capital Lockbox

payload.claim_text: YTD April passenger revenues were down $544 million (28%) compared with YTD April 2019 and April passenger revenues were $151 million (30%) below April 2019.
payload.subject: MTA passenger revenues

payload.gap_text: NOTE: Ridership data are preliminary and subject to revision as well as adjustments warranted by annual audit review.
